metadata.description: Cross-project agent framework: a versioned catalog of reusable Claude Code skills, personas, invariants, instructions, and plugin bundles organized by {stack|common}, plus scripts to scaffold a tailored selection into any project and feed agnostic improvements back.

plugins.name: ai-badger
plugins.description: Installs the ai-badger common skills (welcome-ai-badger, feed-badger, task, maintain-agent-instructions, auto-wm, prompt-markers) used to scaffold and maintain the {stack|common}/{feature} framework catalog inside any project.
